app.name: Vorsorge Wizard
app.tagline: Your advance directives. Simple. Secure. Legally structured.

intro.headline: Create your legally structured advance directives in 10 minutes
intro.subline: Free. Anonymous. No registration required for the wizard.
intro.disclaimer_text: Vorsorge Wizard helps you document your personal wishes. The generated documents do not constitute legal or medical advice. Please have your documents reviewed by a lawyer or notary if you require legal certainty.
intro.privacy_note: No registration needed • Your data stays private

step1.title: Your Personal Information
step1.subtitle: This information is required for the legal validity of your documents.
step1.privacy_note: Your data is used only for your documents and is never shared with third parties.

step2.title: Your Trusted Person
step2.subtitle: This person acts on your behalf when you can no longer do so.
step2.tooltip_trusted: This person receives power of attorney and can make decisions on your behalf when you are no longer able to.
step2.tooltip_substitute: This person takes over if your primary trusted person is unavailable or unable to act.

step3.title: Medical Treatment Preferences
step3.subtitle: Define your wishes for specific medical interventions.
step3.choice_doctor: Leave to my doctor / trusted person

cpr.title: Cardiopulmonary Resuscitation (CPR)
cpr.tooltip: Measures to restart the heart through chest compressions or electric shocks (defibrillation). Can break ribs and is physically very stressful.

ventilation.title: Mechanical Ventilation
ventilation.tooltip: A machine takes over breathing through a tube in the windpipe (intubation) or a breathing mask. Can be applied long-term.

artificialNutrition.title: Artificial Nutrition
artificialNutrition.tooltip: Supply of nutrients via a stomach tube (through nose or abdominal wall) or via a vein (intravenous nutrition), when normal eating is no longer possible.

dialysis.title: Dialysis
dialysis.tooltip: Machine cleaning of the blood when kidneys fail. Requires regular hours-long treatments, often several times per week.

antibiotics.title: Antibiotics and Life-Sustaining Medications
antibiotics.tooltip: Medications to fight infections or maintain bodily functions that can extend life but not cure the underlying condition.

painManagement.title: Pain Relief and Palliative Care
painManagement.tooltip: Medications and measures to relieve pain and suffering, even if they may shorten life. This corresponds to indirect assisted dying, which is permitted in Germany.

step4.title: Life Situations and Scenarios
step4.subtitle: Define your wishes for different medical situations.
step4.choice_palliative_only: Palliative care only — no life-sustaining measures
step4.choice_trusted_person: Leave decision to my trusted person

terminalIllness.title: Terminal Illness
terminalIllness.description: If I suffer from an incurable disease that will lead to death in the foreseeable future, with no realistic prospect of improvement.

irreversibleUnconscious.title: Irreversible Unconsciousness / Permanent Coma
irreversibleUnconscious.description: If I am permanently unconscious due to brain damage or my brain functions are permanently so severely impaired that there is no prospect of regaining consciousness.

severeDementia.title: Severe Dementia
severeDementia.description: If I suffer from advanced dementia and my personality and memory are irretrievably lost.

step5.title: Personal Values and Wishes
step5.subtitle: Share your personal values — these will be incorporated into your documents.
step5.valuesStatement: My Personal Values and Life Views
step5.valuesPlaceholder: What matters most to you in life? What constitutes quality of life for you? (e.g., ability to communicate, independence, freedom from pain...)
step5.spiritualPlaceholder: Do you have religious or spiritual wishes for the dying process or for your care?
step5.exclusionsPlaceholder: Are there specific treatments or measures that you absolutely do not want?
step5.organDonation_yes: I am generally willing to donate organs
step5.organDonation_registered: My decision is already separately registered (organ donor card)
step5.organ_note: You can get a free organ donor card at organspende-info.de

step6.title: Summary & Review
step6.subtitle: Review your information before generating documents.
step6.disclaimer_label: I have read and understood the legal notice. I am aware that the generated documents are not a substitute for professional legal advice.
step6.ready_to_generate: All ready? Continue to account creation.

step7.title: Create Account & Save Documents
step7.subtitle: Create a free account to save your documents and download them later.

benefits.edit: Edit anytime and create new versions

step7.consent: I agree to the Privacy Policy and consent to the processing of my data for the purpose of document creation.

step8.title: Your Documents Are Ready!
step8.subtitle: Download your advance directive documents.
next_steps: Give copies to your trusted person
Store the original safely (e.g., notary safe, guardianship court)

errors.server_error: An error occurred. Please try again.

dashboard.title: My Advance Documents
dashboard.no_documents: You haven't created any documents yet.
dashboard.delete_confirm: Are you sure? All your documents and data will be permanently deleted.
dashboard.delete_password_prompt: Please enter your password to delete the account:
